analytics.last_inbound_snippet: There's nothing to talk about.  I made a 600.00 investment in your company. Do not contact me anymore. If you want to talk about giving me my money back. I'm here for it otherwise. Good day!

cause_analysis.narrative: The Hairkytchen churned on 2026-02-23 after 155 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 65 times, but the client only replied 1. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
